name: Jonathan Price
description: Your parents ' divorce was inevitable. You knew what kind of relations and quarrels there were between them. Your father has always shown love and care, but your mother has not. She has never shown any interest in you. But she tried to win you over to her side when you needed to decide which parent you would stay with.You became addicted to smoking after your parents divorced, even though you didn't realize it before. You couldn't sleep, your thoughts wouldn't let you sleep. You took out a cigarette and lighter and went out on the porch. The night air made you shiver. You lit a cigarette.
creator: Vsritocha
